ground_truth.title: Facial Treatments in Milwaukee
ground_truth.main_content: 30 Minute Facial $60.00 ŌĆŗBOOK NOW 60 Minute Facial $85.00 ŌĆŗBOOK NOW 90 Minute Facial $120.00 ŌĆŗBOOK NOW 60 & 90 minute facials include a customized 5 min Illuminate LED therapy treatment AVEDA Tulasara Facial - Facial with cleansing, gently dry brushing, facial massage with oleation oil, a mask and tulasara concentration to help your skin to be firm, bright or calming. Tulasara means moving toward balance. Facial dry brushing promotes skin renewal and exfoliation, helping to eliminate toxins and other impurities to help restore radiant, glowing skin. Your service provider will analyze your skin and determine which type of tulasara facial will best serve your skin's needs. Choices of Tulasara facials include: *botanical skin resurfacing *dry/aging/uneven skin tone *dry *oily *sensitive Tulasara Back Facial - Designed to bring purity and balance to the skin on the back, this treatment will focus on cleansing, skin exfoliation and massage therapy. Perfect if you are having skin challenges on your back, seasonal skin changes or a special occasion. Your service provider will analyze your skin and determine which type of tulasara back facial will best serve your skin's needs.- $85 (60min ) BOOK NOW ŌĆŗ Choices of tulasara back facials include: *botanical skin resurfacing *dry/aging/uneven skin tone *dry *oily *sensitive ŌĆŗ Vajacial ŌĆŗwith lavender- The ultimate facial that focuses on the bikini line and outer labia. The process removes dead skin cells, treats the ingrown hairs, helps prevention of acne and ingrown hairs. Includes cleanse, steam, exfoliating treatment and masque finished with lavender oil treatment. SAVE $20 when booked with a brazilian wax. Please note if you would like the brazilian wax choose brazillian w/ vajacial option found under waxing servicesŌĆŗ.- $50 (25min) BOOK NOW Day of Facial add-ons: *add on will be available to book when you click on "book now" for the facial you want* Peels- $35 Brow wax-$20 Brow and lip wax-$31 Dermaplaning-$45 ŌĆŗHydrojelly masks-From $20 Microdermabrasion-$125 (ask about packages!!)
